goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the north
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get postcode and star of the hotel
